message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #000000
skinparam classFontName Arial
skinparam classFontSize 14
skinparam classFontStyle plain
skinparam classFontColor #000000
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8
skinparam classHeaderFontColor #000000
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 16
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeIcon #FF6B6B
skinparam classMethodIcon #FF6B6B
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 12
skinparam classMethodIconSize 12
skinparam classAttributeIconPosition left
skinparam classMethodIconPosition left
skinparam classAttributeIconMargin 5
skinparam classMethodIconMargin 5
skinparam classAttributeIconPadding 2
skinparam classMethodIconPadding 2
skinparam classAttributeIconBorderThickness 1
skinparam classMethodIconBorderThickness 1
skinparam classAttributeIconBorderColor #FF6B6B
skinparam classMethodIconBorderColor #FF6B6B
skinparam classAttributeIconBackgroundColor #FF6B6B
skinparam classMethodIconBackgroundColor #FF6B6B
skinparam classAttributeIconForegroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam classMethodIconForegroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam classAttributeIconShape square
skinparam classMethodIconShape square
skinparam classAttributeIconAlignment left
skinparam classMethodIconAlignment left
skinparam classAttributeIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classMethodIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classAttributeIconHorizontalPadding 2
skinparam classMethodIconHorizontalPadding 2
skinparam classAttributeIconVerticalPadding 2
skinparam classMethodIconVerticalPadding 2
skinparam classAttributeIconBorderRadius 0
skinparam classMethodIconBorderRadius 0
skinparam classAttributeIconShadow false
skinparam classMethodIconShadow false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowColor #000000
skinparam classMethodIconShadowColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowOffsetX 1
skinparam classMethodIconShadowOffsetY 1
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowBlur 2
skinparam classMethodIconShadowBlur 2
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowOpacity 0.3
skinparam classMethodIconShadowOpacity 0.3
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowSpread 0
skinparam classMethodIconShadowSpread 0
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowInset false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowInset false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowInner false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowInner false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowOuter false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowOuter false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowBoth false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowBoth false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowNone true
skinparam classMethodIconShadowNone true
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowAll false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowAll false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowSome false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowSome false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowMost false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowMost false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowFew false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowFew false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowMany false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowMany false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowSeveral false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowSeveral false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowMultiple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowMultiple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowSingle false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowSingle false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowDouble false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowDouble false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowTriple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowTriple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowQuadruple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowQuadruple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowQuintuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowQuintuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowSextuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowSextuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowSeptuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowSeptuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowOctuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowOctuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowNonuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowNonuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowDecuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowDecuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowUndecuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowUndecuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowDuodecuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowDuodecuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowTredecuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowTredecuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowQuattuordecuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowQuattuordecuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowQuindecuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowQuindecuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowSexdecuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowSexdecuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowSeptendecuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowSeptendecuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowOctodecuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowOctodecuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowNovemdecuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowNovemdecuple false
skinparam classAttributeIconShadowVigintuple false
skinparam classMethodIconShadowVigintuple false

class MainActivity {
    + camera
    + duration
    --
    + showActiveMeasurement()
    + hideActiveMeasurement()
    + createMeasurement()
    + showResult()
}

class ResultActivity {
    + Measurement
    --
    + displayResult()
    + backToMainActivity()
    + onCreate()
}

class Measurement {
    + camera
    + int[] redValues
    + int imgPerSecond
    --
    + captureImage() : ImageFile
    + start() : void
    + analyzeImage(imageFile) : int
    + calculateResult() : int
}

class File {
}

class ImageFile {
    + File image
    --
    + cropImage() : void
    + toValue() : float[]
}

MainActivity --> Measurement : creates
ResultActivity --> Measurement : uses
ImageFile --|> File : extends
@enduml
